message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Eurobarometer 83.2 (2015): Corruption, Cyber Security, Organised Crime, and Perceived Independence of the Judiciary in the EU","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12530","justification":"Includes modules on corruption, organised crime, and judiciary independence within EU member states including most listed countries, fielded in 2015 (within 2010s), coded under law, crime, and EU institutions."},{"title":"European Social Survey (ESS), Round 5 (2010)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11400","justification":"Contains trust in legal system, police, and other law‑and‑order related variables; covers many of the specified European countries in 2010."},{"title":"European Social Survey (ESS), Round 6 (2012)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12253","justification":"Multinational survey including variables on trust in police and legal system across numerous European countries listed in the query during the 2010s."},{"title":"European Social Survey (ESS), Round 7 (2014)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12253","justification":"Cross‑national dataset with items on police, courts and legal trust in many EU countries in the 2010s; relevant to law and legal systems."},{"title":"European Social Survey (ESS), Round 8 (2016)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13011","justification":"Provides indicators on confidence in the police and legal system and other governance measures for numerous European countries in 2016."},{"title":"European Election Study 2014, Voter Study","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12271","justification":"Contains variables on attitudes toward EU institutions, rule of law, and political trust in EU member states, linking international politics and legal systems in 2014."},{"title":"International Crime Victims Survey (ICVS) 2010 – European Module","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/dbksearch/sdesc2.asp?no=5243&db=e&doi=10.4232/1.5243","justification":"Focuses directly on crime, victimisation and police performance across multiple European countries around 2010, matching the law and crime focus."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 76.1 (2011): Civil Justice, Family Law, and Fundamental Rights","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11488","justification":"Survey about civil justice systems, family law and rights within EU member states, directly on legal systems and EU‑level legal frameworks in 2011."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 74.2 (2010): Corruption and Domestic Violence against Women","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11036","justification":"Contains a corruption module as well as questions about legal protection and enforcement related to domestic violence across EU states in 2010."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 80.1 (2013): Fight against Organized Crime and Corruption in the EU","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11856","justification":"Dedicated to public perceptions of organised crime and corruption and EU‑level efforts, combining crime, law enforcement and international politics for many listed EU countries in 2013."}]}
